subcodes.title: Words to Julia Grundy spoken around Jan. 1905
subcodes.first_line: Bahá‘u'lláh is the same Light in a new Lamp. To see, we must look at the Light and not at the Lamp.... Will is the center or focus of human understanding. We must will to know God
subcodes.subjects: @oneness; unity of religion, @religion as reality; definitions of religion, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @blind imitation [taqlid], @literal interpretation, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
